panels.description: Number of distinct users active with Claude Code in the selected time range

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_email) AS "Active Users"
FROM _tool_claude_usage
WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
  AND connection_id = ${connection_id}

panels.title: Daily Active Users (Period)

panels.description: Total lines of code added by Claude Code sessions

targets.rawSql:
SELECT SUM(lines_added) AS "Lines Added"
FROM _tool_claude_usage
WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
  AND connection_id = ${connection_id}

panels.title: Total Lines Added

panels.description: PRs attributed to Claude Code in the selected time range

targets.rawSql:
SELECT SUM(prs_by_claude) AS "PRs by Claude"
FROM _tool_claude_usage
WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
  AND connection_id = ${connection_id}

panels.title: PRs Created by Claude

panels.description: Total estimated API spend for the selected time range

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(SUM(estimated_cost_usd), 2) AS "Estimated Cost (USD)"
FROM _tool_claude_usage
WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
  AND connection_id = ${connection_id}

panels.title: Estimated Cost (USD)

panels.description: Daily count of distinct users who used Claude Code

targets.rawSql:
SELECT date AS time,
  COUNT(DISTINCT user_email) AS "Daily Active Users"
FROM _tool_claude_usage
WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
  AND connection_id = ${connection_id}
GROUP BY date
ORDER BY date

panels.title: Claude Adoption – Daily Active Users

panels.description: Commits and PRs attributed to Claude over time

targets.rawSql:
SELECT date AS time,
  SUM(prs_by_claude) AS "PRs by Claude",
  SUM(commits_by_claude) AS "Commits by Claude"
FROM _tool_claude_usage
WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
  AND connection_id = ${connection_id}
GROUP BY date
ORDER BY date

panels.title: Coding Velocity – PRs & Commits by Claude

panels.description: Estimated spend per model over time – shows Sonnet vs Opus cost allocation

targets.rawSql:
SELECT date AS time,
  CASE
    WHEN model LIKE '%sonnet%' OR model LIKE '%Sonnet%' THEN 'Sonnet'
    WHEN model LIKE '%opus%'   OR model LIKE '%Opus%'   THEN 'Opus'
    WHEN model LIKE '%haiku%'  OR model LIKE '%Haiku%'  THEN 'Haiku'
    ELSE COALESCE(NULLIF(model,''), 'Unknown')
  END AS metric,
  SUM(estimated_cost_usd) AS value
FROM _tool_claude_usage
WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
  AND connection_id = ${connection_id}
GROUP BY date, metric
ORDER BY date

panels.title: Cost Efficiency – Model Spend Breakdown

panels.description: Ratio of lines removed (refactoring) vs lines added (new feature work) over time. Higher removal ratio signals active code cleanup.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT date AS time,
  SUM(lines_added)   AS "Lines Added (Features)",
  SUM(lines_removed) AS "Lines Removed (Refactoring)",
  ROUND(SUM(lines_removed) / NULLIF(SUM(lines_added), 0), 2) AS "Refactor Ratio"
FROM _tool_claude_usage
WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
  AND connection_id = ${connection_id}
GROUP BY date
ORDER BY date

panels.title: Quality Signal – Lines Added vs Removed

panels.description: Top developers ranked by Claude Code usage (lines added + PRs)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT user_email AS "User",
  COUNT(DISTINCT date) AS "Active Days",
  SUM(num_sessions) AS "Sessions",
  SUM(lines_added) AS "Lines Added",
  SUM(lines_removed) AS "Lines Removed",
  SUM(commits_by_claude) AS "Commits",
  SUM(prs_by_claude) AS "PRs",
  ROUND(SUM(estimated_cost_usd), 2) AS "Cost (USD)"
FROM _tool_claude_usage
WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
  AND connection_id = ${connection_id}
GROUP BY user_email
ORDER BY SUM(lines_added) DESC
LIMIT 25

panels.title: Top Developers by Claude Usage

panels.description: Cost per model with lines-of-code context for ROI analysis

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(model,''), 'Unknown') AS "Model",
  SUM(input_tokens) AS "Input Tokens",
  SUM(output_tokens) AS "Output Tokens",
  SUM(lines_added) AS "Lines Added",
  ROUND(SUM(estimated_cost_usd), 2) AS "Total Cost (USD)",
  ROUND(SUM(estimated_cost_usd) / NULLIF(SUM(lines_added), 0), 4) AS "Cost per Line (USD)"
FROM _tool_claude_usage
WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
  AND connection_id = ${connection_id}
GROUP BY model
ORDER BY SUM(estimated_cost_usd) DESC

panels.title: Cost Efficiency – Model ROI Breakdown

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT connection_id FROM _tool_claude_connections ORDER BY connection_id DESC
list.label: Connection ID
list.name: connection_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT connection_id FROM _tool_claude_connections ORDER BY connection_id DESC
